overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian cyberpunk city at night. The player ascends from a concrete stairwell into rain-slicked streets lined with towering residential blocks, neon billboards, and elevated highways. The atmosphere is moody with wet reflective surfaces, scattered debris, and sparse vehicle traffic passing beneath massive overpasses.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit concrete stairwell, ascending steadily. The camera moves upward through the enclosed space until reaching the top where the scene opens into the ambient light of the city above.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza with wet asphalt reflecting the city lights. A massive highway overpass and a distant mega-tower dominate the skyline while debris litters the ground. The camera turns right and moves through the open area.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrow urban canyon flanked by towering green residential blocks covered in external wiring and balconies. Large digital billboards illuminate the facades. The player passes a burning wrecked car in the street while looking up at the dense architecture overhead.

segments.scene_description: Moving beneath the massive highway overpass, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. The camera walks along the road past concrete barriers and yellow chevron markers. A black sedan drives past on the right as the player continues under the concrete canopy.

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to the sidewalk, walking alongside a metal fence as vehicles pass by on the road to the left. The highway overpass continues overhead but recedes into the distance. Commercial buildings line the right side while the urban canyon extends ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a claustrophobic concrete interior into the expansive, rain-slicked depths of a cyberpunk city. It begins by climbing a dimly lit stairwell, moving steadily upward until the enclosed space opens into a wide urban plaza where wet asphalt reflects the glow of a distant mega-tower and a massive highway overpass. As the camera turns right, the scene shifts into a narrow urban canyon flanked by towering green residential blocks and glowing digital billboards, passing a burning wrecked car along the way. The environment then becomes darker and more oppressive as the camera moves beneath the concrete canopy of the overpass, passing yellow chevron markers and a sleek black sedan. Finally, the perspective transitions to a sidewalk alongside a metal fence, moving past commercial buildings as the highway structure recedes into the distance.
